agents.name: cursor
agents.description: Cursor CLI agent over ACP (stdio JSON-RPC).
agents.authHint: Run `agent login` in your terminal (or set CURSOR_API_KEY) before connecting.
agents.installHint: Install Cursor CLI, then ensure `agent` is on your PATH (often ~/.local/bin/agent).

agents.name: codex-cli
agents.description: OpenAI Codex via the official ACP adapter.
agents.authHint: Sign in with ChatGPT or provide CODEX_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY.

agents.name: claude-code
agents.description: Claude Agent SDK via the official ACP adapter.
agents.authHint: Authenticate Claude Code / set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY before connecting.
agents.installHint: npm install -g @agentclientprotocol/claude-agent-acp  (or use npx on first launch)

agents.name: pipper-mock
agents.description: Local mock ACP agent for development and tests.
